title: The Missing Hot Sauce
primaryEvent: Emma at McGolrick, discovers Hank's stall empty (his first missed Sunday — Dorothy: "haven't seen him since last Sunday"), Dorothy gives bottle. Soup with the sauce. Meal 1 dinner. Theory competition. Plan to investigate.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m1_01_the_missing_hot_sauce.md

title: A Fine Sieve
primaryEvent: Oliver at NYPL. Discovers LLC #2847 (filed three days ago). Goes home; Olivia asleep.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_06_a_fine_sieve.md

title: Gathering the Ingredients
primaryEvent: Olivia at The Gilded Fern (Marcus intel + ingredients). Oliver shares LLC finding at home.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_07_gathering_the_ingredients.md

title: The Bottom Line
primaryEvent: Elijah calls Olivia (tailor question → pivots to LLC share). Elijah posts LLC to group chat. Builds financial model privately.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_08_the_bottom_line.md

title: A Pinch Too Much
primaryEvent: Noah re-engaged by Elijah's text. Traces shell entities.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_09_a_pinch_too_much.md

title: Loose Lips
primaryEvent: Jasper walks Chelsea/High Line. Calls Brenda Marquez. Brenda recognizes LLC. Late that night Brenda calls the mogul's people. Jasper misses her three calls + 11 PM warning text (first of three texts through the weekend).
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_10_loose_lips.md

title: The Empty Stall
primaryEvent: Emma at McCarren Park (Hank's Saturday market — stall already replaced by jarred salsa vendor). Visits Sofia's cheese shop. Learns about "big offer" and Paolo precedent.
simultaneousThreads: Mogul's lawyers/PI begin work on Emma (off-page)
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_11_the_empty_stall.md

title: Coming to a Boil
primaryEvent: **Morning:** Emma at McGolrick — Dorothy brisk with Pike-adjacent customer (seed beat). **Evening:** Meal 2 potluck. Group pools findings. False victory.
simultaneousThreads: Pike's people dig into Emma's finances and freelance clients (off-page, Sat–Sun) — coded, never named on the page. Pike's people visible at McGolrick mid-morning.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m2_12_coming_to_a_boil.md

title: Service for One
primaryEvent: Emma post-victory glow. Texts Sofia (no reply). / Still no Sofia reply — "by Tuesday night the silence had a texture to it." / **Midday:** Emma walks past closed McGolrick; texts Dorothy; no read receipt. Garrett Pike confronts Emma in person at the empty market — first on-page appearance, charm-as-menace, owns the economic squeeze, flags the incoming letter. **Midafternoon:** the C&D arrives under Emma's door, unwitnessed (she finds it on returning home). Emma panics. Olivia rallies group. Emergency Thai dinner. Emma privately confides her precarity to Olivia (Ch14). Noah's information-flow question → Jasper's confession (Ch15). Oliver's speech. Swarm plan (Ch16). Jasper leaves to find Hank. **Jasper takes the hot sauce bottle from Emma's counter on his way out, the night before he leaves (author note: planted twist — see subplot_threads.md → Jasper's bottle).**
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m3_13_service_for_one.md

title: Sharpening the Knives
primaryEvent: Prep montage begins. Noah builds infrastructure overnight. Olivia maps contacts. Oliver/Elijah build press kit. Emma writes narrative. Jasper boards Amtrak to Philadelphia. / Press kit goes out Friday morning. First blogs pick it up. Jasper making nursery calls from PA.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m3_17_sharpening_the_knives.md

title: Turning Up the Heat
primaryEvent: Press kit goes out Friday morning. First blogs pick it up. Jasper making nursery calls from PA.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_18_turning_up_the_heat.md

title: The Ridgeline Diner
primaryEvent: Press kit goes out Friday morning. First blogs pick it up. Jasper making nursery calls from PA.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_19_the_diner.md

title: Ghost Kitchen
primaryEvent: Story spreading. Conservative commentator post. Anonymous account traced — close call. Doubt resurfaces. Sentiment battle. Group tense. Emma personally baits a Pike-hating food writer off her grudge map (Ch20). Jasper following Fish Pepper lead. Noah reaches out to Jasper directly — Jasper replies privately, doesn't loop in the group, and starts routing Hank updates through Noah specifically.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_20_ghost_kitchen.md

title: The Starlite Drive-In
primaryEvent: Story spreading. Conservative commentator post. Anonymous account traced — close call. Doubt resurfaces. Sentiment battle. Group tense. Emma personally baits a Pike-hating food writer off her grudge map (Ch20). Jasper following Fish Pepper lead. Noah reaches out to Jasper directly — Jasper replies privately, doesn't loop in the group, and starts routing Hank updates through Noah specifically.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_21_the_drive_in.md

title: Murph's
beat: Finale (from the road — the low point)
primaryEvent: Jasper making calls. 20+ calls. Meadowlight Collective surfaces — a bartender at Murph's (Sun night) names it. Jasper closing in (off-page, Mon). Sunday night: the petty-writer piece drops (Emma's bait pays off; the campaign's one counterweight through the weekend).
simultaneousThreads: Brooklyn (waiting / Oliver finalizing rebuttal) ↔ PA (Jasper closing in)
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_22_the_dive.md

title: Farm to Table
primaryEvent: Jasper drives out to Meadowlight (~2 hrs west of Philadelphia). Finds Hank in Meadowlight greenhouse — shows him the bottle. Hank agrees to come to dinner "this Sunday." Oliver's rebuttal goes live. Food critic picks it up; her coverage tips sentiment; mogul's investors pull back; trademark-claims withdrawal hits the wires — all the same Tuesday (Ch24 has no Wed/Thu markers).
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_23_farm_to_table.md

title: Family Meal
primaryEvent: Family Meal. Hank arrives with Jasper. Jasper returns the bottle. Group commits to gathering again the following Sunday.
sourceFile: stories/01. The Case of the Missing Hot Sauce/chapters/m4_25_family_meal.md
